_comment: Controlled vocabulary for value_journal.jsonl's 'contribution_type' field — describes HOW you contributed to an activity's outcome, not what the activity was. Matches the vocabulary the roadmap's My Impact dashboard (R1-T07) expects. Optional on a journal entry; 'other' is an escape hatch.

initiated.label: Initiated
initiated.description: You started this — it wouldn't have happened without you raising it.

led.label: Led
led.description: You owned and drove this activity end to end.

influenced.label: Influenced
influenced.description: You shaped the outcome without owning the activity outright.

supported.label: Supported
supported.description: You contributed to someone else's activity.

connected.label: Connected
connected.description: You made an introduction or connection that enabled this.

accelerated.label: Accelerated
accelerated.description: You sped up something already in motion.

protected.label: Protected
protected.description: You prevented a loss, churn, or negative outcome.

other.label: Other
other.description: Anything not covered above — explain in the notes field.
